title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sankara Nethralaya - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sankara Nethralaya - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sankara Nethralaya, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sankara Nethralaya:
Sankara Nethralaya is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
